# Agent OS Engineering Portal

Canonical repository: https://github.com/alex-mextner/HyperOS

Primary records:
- /knowledge/BRIEFING.md
- /knowledge/docs/INDEX.md
- /knowledge/docs/architecture/ARCH-001-portable-system-architecture.md
- /knowledge/docs/architecture/ARCH-002-microkernel.md
- /knowledge/docs/hardware/HW-001-target-portfolio.md
- /knowledge/docs/planning/PLAN-002-roadmap-and-gantt.md

Android and Linux are restricted to isolated Pixel 9 evidence and bring-up work. The native architecture is an original Rust-first microkernel and owned system stack.
